name: Loa Tennis Courts
description: Loa Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Hanksville, UT. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Wayne Middle School Gym
description: Wayne Middle School Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bicknell, UT. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
